subject: Need a refund - charged for plan I never used
body: Hi, I signed up for the Pro plan 5 days ago and never used it. Life got in the way. Can I get a refund? I haven't logged in once since signing up.

subject: Suddenly getting 429s on production API
body: We've been on the Pro plan for 6 months with no issues. Starting around 9am UTC today our integration is getting hammered with 429 errors. We haven't changed any code. What's going on?

subject: Cannot log in - 2FA codes not arriving
body: I'm locked out. The SMS codes never come through. I'm on a Vodafone UK number. Tried 6 times this morning. Already changed my phone last month - is that related?

subject: GDPR deletion request
body: Per GDPR Article 17, I am requesting the deletion of all personal data associated with my account. Please confirm completion in writing within the statutory timeframe.

subject: Big export not coming through
body: I requested a CSV export 2 days ago and the email never arrived. Workspace has about 80GB of data. What should I do?
